narrative: Machine Learning Engineer with 6 years at Verloop.io, a product‑focused startup, based in Gurgaon. Primary ranking driver is a modest trust signal and a JD‑relevant skill score that sits slightly below the pool average. He has hands‑on experience with TensorFlow, Elasticsearch and Weaviate, and has built learning‑to‑rank pipelines that directly map to our search‑and‑retrieval requirements. His 6‑year background aligns well with the 5‑9 year target, and while based in Gurgaon he is within commuting distance of Pune/Noida. Notice period is unknown, which could affect timing.
